description.unified: [(added) Removes all harmful effects from all allies and] increases their Attack by 252*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), Attack Speed by 10%, and Physical Defense by 91*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) for 8sec.
Every second, Attack increases by 16*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), Status Resistance by 10, and damage dealt to non-hero enemies by 1%. This effect stacks up to [30->20] times.

IV.unified: Status Resistance increases by [10->30] for each stack.

description.unified: [Smash] reduces the target’s ATK by 25% and increases the P.DMG they take by {0}% for 10 sec.
[Battle Roar] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases targets' Crit DMG by {0}% for the duration of Skill.
[Vortex] increases DMG by {0}%, and its last hit increases the P.DMG the target takes by {1}% for 10 sec.
